TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: smatu sapat gluw mlikuy hiya ga lmon samow urow kya kwara musa naha satu btiyux, gluw ina hiya ga utux utux lpgun naha ro nya aw ci cnpngan, ppsiyey hiya ga mtama luhung kya ro yaya ro yaya sa'ing mrkyas hiya ga musa mlahang gaga na sbaley, ppsiyey hiya ga stuling nya kopu ru rpusun naha 'sya, babow nya ga yaba yaya na ina ga rpus 'sya tluling naha, puting ga yaya yaya na mlikuy ga skahul kr'un naha iyik kopu tliling naha ro rpus naha 'sya uy. gluw na ina hiya ga wa magan btiyux laga ba'un maras sali naha la.
S.PHON: s~…ēmatu s~…ēapat …£luw mlikuj ńßija …£a lmon s~…ēamow urow kja kwara mus~…ēa nańßa s~…ēatu ő≤tijux, …£luw ina ńßija …£a utux utux lp…£un nańßa ro nja aw ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®npŇčan, pps~…ēijej ńßija …£a mtama luńßuŇč kja ro jaja ro jaja s~…ēa ĒiŇč mrkjas~…ē ńßija …£a mus~…ēa mlańßaŇč …£a…£a na s~…ēő≤alej, pps~…ēijej ńßija …£a s~…ētuliŇč nja kopu ru rpus~…ēun nańßa Ēs~…ēja, ő≤aő≤ow nja …£a jaő≤a jaja na ina …£a rpus~…ē Ēs~…ēja tluliŇč nańßa, putiŇč …£a jaja jaja na mlikuj …£a s~…ēkańßul kr Ēun nańßa ijik kopu tliliŇč nańßa ro rpus~…ē nańßa Ēs~…ēja uj. …£luw na ina ńßija …£a wa ma…£an ő≤tijux la…£a ő≤a Ēun maras~…ē s~…ēali nańßa la.
S.FORM: smatu sapat gluw mlikuy hiya ga lmon samow urow kya kwara musa naha satu btiyux, gluw ina hiya ga utux utux lpgun naha ro nya aw ci cnpngan, ppsiyey hiya ga mtama luhung kya ro yaya ro yaya sa'ing mrkyas hiya ga musa mlahang gaga na sbaley, ppsiyey hiya ga stuling nya kopu ru rpusun naha 'sya, babow nya ga yaba yaya na ina ga rpus 'sya tluling naha, puting ga yaya yaya na mlikuy ga skahul kr'un naha iyik kopu tliling naha ro rpus naha 'sya uy. gluw na ina hiya ga wa magan btiyux laga ba'un maras sali naha la.
S.PHON: s~…ēmatu s~…ēapat …£luw mlikuj ńßija …£a lmon s~…ēamow urow kja kwara mus~…ēa nańßa s~…ēatu ő≤tijux, …£luw ina ńßija …£a utux utux lp…£un nańßa ro nja aw ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®npŇčan, pps~…ēijej ńßija …£a mtama luńßuŇč kja ro jaja ro jaja s~…ēa ĒiŇč mrkjas~…ē ńßija …£a mus~…ēa mlańßaŇč …£a…£a na s~…ēő≤alej, pps~…ēijej ńßija …£a s~…ētuliŇč nja kopu ru rpus~…ēun nańßa Ēs~…ēja, ő≤aő≤ow nja …£a jaő≤a jaja na ina …£a rpus~…ē Ēs~…ēja tluliŇč nańßa, putiŇč …£a jaja jaja na mlikuj …£a s~…ēkańßul kr Ēun nańßa ijik kopu tliliŇč nańßa ro rpus~…ē nańßa Ēs~…ēja uj. …£luw na ina ńßija …£a wa ma…£an ő≤tijux la…£a ő≤a Ēun maras~…ē s~…ēali nańßa la.
